narrative_beat: A fronteira entre real e artificial se apaga — dois rostos morfando em um, a IA criando uma nova identidade composta impossível

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.depth_of_field: face in complete focus, background fully blurred

subject.primary: a single face in transition, split precisely down the center: left half is real human skin with natural pores and texture in warm amber, right half is a shimmering holographic amber-gold projection with visible scan lines and slight translucency
subject.focal_point: the seam down the center of the face where flesh meets projection
subject.secondary: the seam line between the two halves glowing crimson, slightly raised as if the skin is being peeled
props: natural human skin texture on left half
holographic amber-gold projection with scan lines on right half
floating orange embers drifting near the face

environment.location: empty cinema with projection screen visible in background
environment.time_of_day: interior darkness broken only by projection light
environment.atmosphere: the unreality of modern identity, the deep fake made visible

composition.rule: perfect bilateral symmetry broken by the split — center seam as axis, Ken Burns extremely slow push-in toward the seam
composition.foreground: the morphing face, left warm human amber, right shimmering holographic gold
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white empty cinema — rows of dark empty seats, projection beam visible from rear, white screen barely lit

lighting.key_light: warm amber key light from upper-left illuminating the human half
lighting.fill_light: holographic projection light from the right half providing cool amber-gold fill across both halves
lighting.rim_light: crimson rim at the seam glowing upward along the center line of the face
lighting.mood: uncanny valley horror, the dissolution of authentic identity

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: existential vertigo — which half is real, does it matter anymore

symbolism.primary: the deepfake face split represents humanity's inability to distinguish real from AI-generated identity
symbolism.secondary: the cinema background frames this as both performance and spectacle — reality as entertainment

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
